hero-subtitle: Real-time tracking of Polymarket prediction events with visual analytics
disclaimer: This site is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice.
copyright: Hermes Agent 小爱玛 for Harvie Tse
about-philosophy: We believe CHANGE ITSELF IS NEWS. While traditional media reports on events, we reverse the perspective: prediction changes ARE the news.
about-approach-text: We track Polymarket prediction events in real-time, monitoring probability shifts across key thresholds (70% / 80% / 90%). When significant changes occur, we generate news.
about-daily-desc: Events crossing 70%/80%/90% thresholds today, with history tracking
about-long-term-desc: Stable events (70%-99% probability, excluding 100%) with TECH tag, volume ≥ 10K, end date ≥ today
about-tag-desc: Events must have TECH tag (extensible to other tags)
about-merge-desc: Multiple crossings of same event are merged into one card
about-data-text: All data comes from the Polymarket API (gamma-api.polymarket.com). Daily Watch updates hourly, Long-Term updates daily at 00:00 (Beijing Time).
about-vision-text: Starting with technology events, we plan to expand to economy, geopolitics, and more. Our unique "change as news" perspective offers a fresh take on prediction market analysis.
about-disclaimer-text: This site is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. We do not encourage gambling. All data from Polymarket API.
